xpongemtcont.gemports:
<#if tc0\-tcont\-name?has_content>
<#if gemport\-set\-name?has_content && (!enet\-name?has_content)> ${gemport\-set\-name}-${cc\-name}-GEM0 ${cc\-name} </#if> <#if gemport\-set\-name?has_content && (enet\-name?has_content)> ${gemport\-set\-name}-${enet\-name}-GEM0 ${enet\-name} </#if> <#if (!gemport\-set\-name?has_content) && (enet\-name?has_content)> ${enet\-name}-GEM0 ${enet\-name} <#else> ${cc\-name}-GEM0 ${cc\-name} </#if> 0 ${tc0\-tcont\-name}
</#if> <#if tc1\-tcont\-name?has_content>
<#if gemport\-set\-name?has_content && (!enet\-name?has_content)> ${gemport\-set\-name}-${cc\-name}-GEM1 ${cc\-name} </#if> <#if gemport\-set\-name?has_content && (enet\-name?has_content)> ${gemport\-set\-name}-${enet\-name}-GEM1 ${enet\-name} </#if> <#if (!gemport\-set\-name?has_content) && (enet\-name?has_content)> ${enet\-name}-GEM1 ${enet\-name} <#else> ${cc\-name}-GEM1 ${cc\-name} </#if> 1 ${tc1\-tcont\-name}
</#if> <#if tc2\-tcont\-name?has_content>

</#if> <#if tc3\-tcont\-name?has_content>
<#if gemport\-set\-name?has_content && (!enet\-name?has_content)> ${gemport\-set\-name}-${cc\-name}-GEM3 ${cc\-name} </#if> <#if gemport\-set\-name?has_content && (enet\-name?has_content)> ${gemport\-set\-name}-${enet\-name}-GEM3 ${enet\-name} </#if> <#if (!gemport\-set\-name?has_content) && (enet\-name?has_content)> ${enet\-name}-GEM3 ${enet\-name} <#else> ${cc\-name}-GEM3 ${cc\-name} </#if> 3 ${tc3\-tcont\-name}
</#if> <#if tc4\-tcont\-name?has_content>
<#if gemport\-set\-name?has_content && (!enet\-name?has_content)> ${gemport\-set\-name}-${cc\-name}-GEM4 ${cc\-name} </#if> <#if gemport\-set\-name?has_content && (enet\-name?has_content)> ${gemport\-set\-name}-${enet\-name}-GEM4 ${enet\-name} </#if> <#if (!gemport\-set\-name?has_content) && (enet\-name?has_content)> ${enet\-name}-GEM4 ${enet\-name} <#else> ${cc\-name}-GEM4 ${cc\-name} </#if> 4 ${tc4\-tcont\-name}
</#if> <#if tc5\-tcont\-name?has_content>
<#if gemport\-set\-name?has_content && (!enet\-name?has_content)> ${gemport\-set\-name}-${cc\-name}-GEM5 ${cc\-name} </#if> <#if gemport\-set\-name?has_content && (enet\-name?has_content)> ${gemport\-set\-name}-${enet\-name}-GEM5 ${enet\-name} </#if> <#if (!gemport\-set\-name?has_content) && (enet\-name?has_content)> ${enet\-name}-GEM5 ${enet\-name} <#else> ${cc\-name}-GEM5 ${cc\-name} </#if> 5 ${tc5\-tcont\-name}
</#if> <#if tc6\-tcont\-name?has_content>

</#if> <#if tc7\-tcont\-name?has_content>
<#if gemport\-set\-name?has_content && (!enet\-name?has_content)> ${gemport\-set\-name}-${cc\-name}-GEM7 ${cc\-name} </#if> <#if gemport\-set\-name?has_content && (enet\-name?has_content)> ${gemport\-set\-name}-${enet\-name}-GEM7 ${enet\-name} </#if> <#if (!gemport\-set\-name?has_content) && (enet\-name?has_content)> ${enet\-name}-GEM7 ${enet\-name} <#else> ${cc\-name}-GEM7 ${cc\-name} </#if> 7 ${tc7\-tcont\-name}
